## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor (code change without feature/fix)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Screenshots (if UI change)

<!-- Add before/after screenshots when applicable -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I did not include secrets or sensitive data
